channel.title: DailyBite — Daily Food Deals
channel.description: The best verified food deals, updated every morning.

item.title: Wingstop: $16.99 Boneless Meal Deal
item.description: Get 20 boneless wings in up to four flavors, a large fry, and two dipping sauces for $16.99. (Limited time)

item.title: Domino's: Best Deal Ever: Any Pizza for $9.99
item.guid: Domino's-Best Deal Ever: Any Pizza for $9.99-2026-07-23
item.description: Order any pizza with any crust and any toppings — including Parmesan Stuffed Crust at no extra charge — for $9.99 each. (Through July 26, 2026)

item.title: Popeyes: $5 Faves Menu
item.description: Choose three pieces of chicken, two sides, or a chicken sandwich for just $5 at participating locations. (Through August 31, 2026)

item.title: Arby's: $1.99 Sliders
item.description: Get any Arby's Slider for $1.99 each at participating locations in-restaurant, online, or in-app. (Limited time)

item.title: McDonald's: $5 Value Meal in the App
item.guid: McDonald's-$5 Value Meal in the App-2026-07-23
item.description: Find daily in-app deals including combo meals, McDouble or McChicken bundles with nuggets, small fries, and a drink around $5. (Ongoing)

item.title: Wendy's: Biggie Deals: $4, $6, and $8 Meal Options
item.description: Choose from three tiers of Biggie Deal meal combos in the Wendy's app, starting at just $4. (Ongoing)

item.title: Taco Bell: $5.99 Luxe Cravings Box
item.description: Get a filling meal box via the Taco Bell app featuring multiple items including a Chalupa Supreme, burrito, and more for $5.99. (Ongoing)

item.title: Del Taco: Value Menu: Bean and Cheese Burrito Under $2
item.guid: Del Taco-Value Menu: Bean and Cheese Burrito Unde-2026-07-23
item.description: Del Taco's everyday value menu features Bean and Cheese Burritos frequently priced under $2 at participating locations. (Ongoing)

item.title: IHOP: $6 Value Menu
item.description: IHOP's $6 Value Menu offers budget-friendly breakfast and all-day diner plates at participating locations open late. (Ongoing)

item.title: Jimmy John's: Free Lemonade with Any 8-Inch Sandwich, Code SUMMERFRIDAY
item.guid: Jimmy John's-Free Lemonade with Any 8-Inch Sandwich, -2026-07-23
item.description: Get a free house-made lemonade with any 8-inch sandwich or wrap order today using promo code SUMMERFRIDAY online or in the app. (Through July 24, 2026)

item.title: Sonic: $7 Big Deal Meal
item.description: Score a cheeseburger, a small order of chicken bites, a medium drink, and medium fries or tots all for $7. (Limited time)
